--- title: "IMQOptions.safeDelivery property | @imqueue/rpc 3.2.1" --- {% raw %}

Home > @imqueue/rpc > IMQOptions > safeDelivery

IMQOptions.safeDelivery property

Enable guaranteed message delivery. When enabled, uses a more complex algorithm for message handling, ensuring that if a worker fails, the message will be delivered to another worker. Required only for systems that demand guaranteed delivery semantics.

{boolean}

Signature:

safeDelivery?: boolean;
{% endraw %}
